AllowedHosts.description: Semicolon-separated list of allowed host headers. Use "*" to allow any host.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: OTLP endpoint for OpenTelemetry tracing, metrics, and logging. Overridden automatically by Aspire.

byakko-db.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Overridden automatically by Aspire.

localstack.description: LocalStack endpoint URL (e.g. http://localhost:4566). Overridden automatically by Aspire.

Authority.description: Keycloak realm URL used to validate JWT tokens (e.g. https://localhost:4322/realms/MadWorld).

Audience.description: Expected audience claim in the JWT (e.g. api-client).

ValidateUser.description: When false, authentication middleware is registered but token validation is skipped. Useful for local testing.

AutoMigrate.description: When true, EF Core migrations are applied automatically on startup via MigrationService.

Mode.description:
S3-compatible storage provider.
- LocalStack: local development using static test/test credentials and us-east-1.
- OvhCloud: production object storage on OVH.

BucketName.description: Name of the S3 bucket used to store asset content.

AutoCreateBucket.description: When true, BucketInitializer creates the bucket on startup if it does not exist. Enable in Development; disable in production where the bucket is provisioned externally.

OvhCloud.description: OVHCloud S3-compatible storage credentials. Required when Mode is OvhCloud.

AccessKey.description: OVHCloud S3 access key. Store securely — do not commit real credentials.

SecretKey.description: OVHCloud S3 secret key. Store securely — do not commit real credentials.

AllowedOrigins.description: List of allowed CORS origins. An empty array falls back to allowing any origin.

Key.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte AES-256 encryption key. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

TriggerHourUtc.description: UTC hour (0–23) at which the expired asset cleanup job runs each day. Defaults to 2 (02:00 UTC).

Enabled.description: Enables or disables rate limiting globally. Disabled by default in Development.

General.description: Fixed-window policy applied to all endpoints.

Content.description: Stricter fixed-window policy applied additionally to upload and download endpoints.

PermitLimit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per window per user.

WindowInSeconds.description: Duration of the fixed window in seconds.
